articles.author: RFE/RL
articles.title: Ukraine Launches Scores Of Drones On Final Day Of Major Russian Investment Forum - Radio Free Europe/Radio Liberty
articles.description: Ukraine launched hundreds of drones at targets across Russia, including scores over the St. Petersburg region, on the final day of Russia’s most important investment forum.
articles.content:
Ukraine launched hundreds of drones at targets across Russia, including scores over the St. Petersburg region, on the final day of Russias most important investment forum.

articles.title: Pope to find a secularized, polarized Spain where the Catholic Church has a complex legacy - AP News
articles.description: Pope Leo XIV’s trip to Spain will bring the American pontiff to a traditional center of European Christianity, where the Catholic Church has a complex legacy and the Socialist-led government is in a political crisis. Leo’s weeklong visit begins Saturday in Ma…
